p.strong: Sliding Window Analysis for Thrashing Detection

g.text: Working Set = distinct VPNs in window
Complexity: O(W) where W = window size
Window size W trades responsiveness vs stability

text.tspan: // Every access evicts a needed page
// Every access evicts a needed page

div.p: Working Set Size │ 6 ───┤ ╭──╮ │ ╱ ╰─╮ 5 ───┤ ╭───╯ ╰──╮ │ ╱ ╰─ 4 ───┤ ╭───╯ │ ╭───╯ 3 ───┤───╯ │ 2 ───┤ │ 1 ───┤ └────────────────────────────→ Time Phase A Phase B Phase C ───── Available frames (4) ████ Working set exceeds frames → THRASHING

g.text: • Solution: more RAM or smaller WS

text.tspan: // Check for thrashing after each access
// Check for thrashing after each access
